name: track
description: Record-only spec / realization / acceptance system of record. Bundles the read-only track-mcp server (report / query / validate / branch-provenance / freshness) over a project's .track/ event log. Writes stay on the `track` CLI (record-only, append-only, integrity-chained).
skillsComment: Skill source of truth lives in .claude-plugin/skills/present-decision/ (tool-neutral SKILL.md + assets). NOTE: Claude Code auto-discovers skills only at <plugin-root>/skills/ — NOT under .claude-plugin/ — and the manifest has no `skills` field (skills are discovered by location). So this dir is NOT natively auto-loaded; it is the canonical, tool-neutral source rendered onto each host (Claude/Codex/Gemini) by `track install-skills` (next lot). Until then, install manually by copying present-decision/ into the host's skills path.

track.comment: -p selects the package so npx runs the `track-mcp` bin (not the `track` CLI bin, which shares the package).
